reference: Hi. Please check your thyroid levels in blood and visit a psychiatrist without any delay. This may be a major depressive disorder to the extent of suicidality. This is curable if you take medication regularly. Let us not make life more gloomy; arise and hope for your good health.
text: Hi. Please check your thyroid levels and blood, and visit a psychiatrist without any delay. This may be a major depressive disorder to the extent of suicidality; this is curable if you take medication regularly. Let us not make life more gloomy; arise and hope for your good health.
